characters.appearance: Asian female, 30s, medium build, light complexion. She has black wavy hair tied back.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt and a beige apron.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful but slightly stiff and unnatural.

characters.appearance: Asian male, 30s, medium build, light complexion. He has short black hair and wears glasses.
White humanoid robot face with glowing blue eyes and visible panel lines on its cheeks and forehead.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Pata hai problem kya hai? Main roz English padhti hoon, par kisi se baat nahi kar paati. [You know what the problem is? I study English every day, but I can't talk to anyone.]
Character B says: Shayad tum ye teen galtiyan kar rahi ho. [You're probably making these three mistakes.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable problem for Indian learners: studying English but failing to speak it.
- Establishes a friendly, peer-to-peer dynamic.
- Sets up a 'curiosity gap' by mentioning three common mistakes.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PATA HAI PROBLEM KYA HAI? (YOU KNOW WHAT THE PROBLEM IS?)
ROZ ENGLISH PADHTI HOON (I STUDY ENGLISH EVERY DAY)
PAR BAAT NAHI KAR PAATI. (BUT CAN'T TALK.)
SHAYAD TUM YE (YOU'RE PROBABLY)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Number one, sirf grammar books padhna. Number two, mehenge courses mein paise waste karna. Number three, har naye word ke liye Google Translate use karna. [Number one, only reading grammar books. Number two, wasting money on expensive courses. Number three, using Google Translate for every new word.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Calls out ineffective traditional learning methods.
- Validates the learner's frustration by showing that the methods, not the learner, are the problem.
- Uses a fast-paced montage to keep visual interest high.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SIRF GRAMMAR BOOKS PADHNA. (ONLY READING GRAMMAR BOOKS.)
MEHENGE COURSES MEIN (IN EXPENSIVE COURSES)
PAISE WASTE KARNA. (WASTING MONEY.)
NUMBER THREE, (NUMBER THREE,)
HAR NAYE WORD KE LIYE (FOR EVERY NEW WORD)
GOOGLE TRANSLATE USE KARNA. (USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Isliye, Supernova try karo. Ye dekho. [Instead, try Supernova. Watch this.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Pivots from the problem to the solution.
- Introduces the brand name clearly.
- Acts as a transition into the product demo.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character E says: Kya aap English bolte ho? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Thodi bahut. [Just so-so.]
Character E says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am India. [I am India.]
Character E says: Almost right! Aapko bolna chahiye, "I am from India." [Almost right! You should say, "I am from India."]
Character A says: Arre yaar, main hamesha ye galti karti hoon. [Oh man, I always make this mistake.]
Character E says: Koi baat nahi, main yahan aapki English theek karne ke liye hi hoon. [It's okay, I'm here to help you correct your English.]
Character A says: Par mujhe interview aur office ke liye practice karni hai. [But I need to practice for interviews and the office.]
Character E says: Tension mat lo! Supernova par aap real-life situations jaise interview ya shopping ki practice kar sakte ho. Aur wo bhi bohot affordable price par. [Don't worry! On Supernova you can practice real-life situations like interviews or shopping. And that too at a very affordable price.]
Character A says: Sach mein? [Really?]
Character E says: Haan! Bilkul ek real teacher ki tarah. Main aapki grammar aur pronunciation theek karunga, taaki aap confidence se bol sako. [Yes! Just like a real teacher. I will correct your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak confidently.]
Character A says: Sahi hai! Toh main abhi Supernova download karti hoon! [Great! Then I'll download Supernova right away!]
Character E says: Awesome! Chalo English practice shuru karein. [Awesome! Let's start practicing English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product value: interactive AI tutoring that corrects mistakes gently.
- Addresses a specific user need (interview/office practice) rather than relying on a 'free' gimmick.
- Highlights affordability and real-world application, ending on an empowering note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Kya aap English bolte ho? (Do you speak English?)
Thodi bahut. (Just so-so.)
Where are you from? (Where are you from?)
I am India. (I am India.)
Almost right! Aapko bolna chahiye, "I am from India." (Almost right! You should say, "I am from India.")
Arre yaar, main hamesha ye galti karti hoon. (Oh man, I always make this mistake.)
Koi baat nahi, main yahan aapki English theek karne ke liye hi hoon. (It's okay, I'm here to help you correct your English.)
Par mujhe interview aur office ke liye practice karni hai. (But I need to practice for interviews and the office.)
Tension mat lo! (Don't worry!)
Supernova par aap real-life situations ki practice kar sakte ho. (On Supernova you can practice real-life situations.)
Aur wo bhi bohot affordable price par. (And that too at a very affordable price.)
Sach mein? (Really?)
Haan! Bilkul ek real teacher ki tarah. (Yes! Just like a real teacher.)
Main aapki grammar aur pronunciation theek karunga (I will correct your grammar and pronunciation)
taaki aap confidence se bol sako. (so you can speak confidently.)
Sahi hai! Toh main abhi Supernova download karti hoon! (Great! Then I'll download Supernova right away!)
Awesome! Chalo English practice shuru karein. (Awesome! Let's start practicing English.)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Aaj hi download karein. Apni practice shuru karein. [Download today. Start your practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct Call to Action.
- Reinforces the brand name and app store availability.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Aaj hi download karein! (Download today!)
Practice shuru karein! (Start practicing!)
Supernova
App Store se download karein (Download on the App Store)
Google Play se download karein (Get it on Google Play)
